command: env PYTHONPATH=outputs/code python outputs/code/scripts/write_benchmark_deep_metrics.py --corpus er-stress-cross-platform --baseline-dir outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/baselines --harmonized data/deg/harmonized/er-stress-cross-platform_harmonized.csv --gold data/studies/gold/er_stress_upr_gold_panel.csv --gold-gene-column gene_symbol --piper-score-csv outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/piper_gene_scores.csv --output-dir outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/deep-metrics --title 'ER Stress Cross-Platform Deep Benchmark Metrics' --min-studies 2 --max-k 1000 --n-bootstrap 50 --bootstrap-methods weighted_stouffer fisher --seed 1729
